items.title: Instagram rolling out ‘AI Creator’ labels on a test basis
items.summary: Instagram shared via its official Creators account that it was testing out a new “AI Creator” label as it encouraged self-identification to build user trust
items.whyItMatters: Technology updates can influence strategy, risk, and the speed of change across digital products.

items.title: Take-Two CEO Strauss Zelnick Explains Why GTA 6 Isn't Coming to PC, Says Console Is 'Core' Audience
items.summary: Take-Two CEO Strauss Zelnick has talked about why Rockstar Games is not releasing GTA 6 on PC on day one. The Take-Two boss said consoles were Rockstar's "core" audience. "“Rock...

items.title: Curium Life: AI platform for surgical intelligence
items.summary: Curium Life builds AI for surgery. Its SurgiMeasure tool brings real-time insights into the OR, backed by clinical studies and global collaborators.
